title: pluchea lycioides
intro: Pluchea lycioides, also known as Kalmegh or False Hemidesmus, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Pluchea lycioides include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Pluchea lycioides include its use in decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are often consumed as a tonic to promote overall health and well-being.
